'''Kamur''' was an agricultural world owned by [[House Petro]], and the homeworld of the [[Thanu]] species, which inhabited the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] volcanic regions.<ref name="TEA" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' {{1stm}}
